{"query":"World Chain native USDC integration June 2025 developer activity stablecoin transfers official release","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1640,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://world.org/blog/announcements/across-integrates-world-chain-fast-secure-cross-chain-transactions","title":"Across integrates with World Chain for fast, secure cross-chain transactions","content":"November 1, 2024 1 Minute read
Across has integrated with World Chain to enable fast, secure and affordable cross-chain transactions across multiple EVM-compatible chains.
Because World Chain is part of Optimism’s Superchain, it’s able to leverage ERC-7683, a swapping standard co-developed by Across and Uniswap, to enable cross chain interoperability powered by intents.
The announcement of the Across integration comes on the heels of both World Chain’s mainnet launch and Across’s integration with Uniswap.
World Chain was designed to prioritize anonymously verified human interactions over bots and AI through direct protocol integrations with World ID for proof-of-human verification.
It works alongside Optimism and the wider Ethereum ecosystem as part of the Superchain."},{"url":"https://cryptorank.io/news/feed/05828-world-natively-integrates-circles-usdt","title":"USDC on World Chain unlocks new experiences for developers and institutions","content":"The upgrade enhanced liquidity, security, and capital efficiency for developers and users across the World Chain ecosystem.
Circle and World confirmed that Circle will issue USDC as native stablecoins directly on the World Chain.
Additionally, CCTP V2 is available on World Chain for cross-chain USDC transfers to Avalanche, Base, Ethereum, and Linea.
Additionally, developers can build using USDC directly into World App Mini Apps and tap into its globally distributed blockchain.
Circle also claimed that USDC fueled innovation in DeFi, payments, financial services, and more, enabling dollar-backed trading and global settlement for developers and users.
Circle claimed that CCTP V2 will enable cross-chain onboarding for apps on World Chain by allowing USDC deposits directly from supported blockchains.
Developers and their users can transfer USDC securely between World Chain and supported blockchains almost instantly.
Integrated USDC support for Mini Apps means that developers building Mini Apps will access the regulated digital dollar to create use cases like P2P payments, savings, and e-commerce."},{"url":"https://bitcoinfoundation.org/news/altcoins/blockchain-projects-gaining-massive-attention/","title":"Blockchain Projects Gaining Massive Attention in 2026","content":"Eclipse brings Solana-style execution into Ethereum’s orbit.

Monad, Eclipse, Berachain, Celestia, and Fuel are among the names investors are watching.
Monad targets high-speed EVM execution.

World Chain, the blockchain of Sam Altman-backed World Network, is now host to natively minted USDC, the stablecoin issued by recently listed crypto firm Circle (CRCL), the companies said on Wednesday. Some 2 million World Network users already held bridged USDC, and this has now been upgraded to native USDC issued directly by Circle, according to a press release. Businesses can use Circle Mintto directly convert between fiat and USDC on the layer-2 blockchain, enabling global on/off-ramps and cross-chain swaps with no third-party bridges, the release said.","score":0.76300776,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.circle.com/blog/native-usdc-and-cctp-v2-are-coming-soon-to-world-chain","title":"Native USDC and CCTP V2 are coming soon to World Chain","content":"Native USDC and CCTP V2 are coming soon to World Chain. enabling frictionless crosschain transfers for developers and users.","score":0.62523276,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://world.org/blog/announcements/world-integrates-circles-usdc-and-cctp","title":"Circle's USDC and CCTP V2 Power Fast, Global Transfers on World","content":"Circle's USDC and CCTP V2 (Cross-Chain Transfer Protocol) are are now live on World Chain.
